name: Simple Deck
description: 通用 horizontal-swipe HTML deck, 不要 magazine 调
usage: 【模板: Simple Deck】 通用 horizontal-swipe HTML deck, 不要 magazine 调
trigger_terms: 通用 horizontal-swipe HTML deck, 不要 magazine 调
best_for: 通用 horizontal-swipe HTML deck, 不要 magazine 调
Requests that need presentation and deck-style storytelling.
Use when the user asks for 通用 Simple Deck.
avoid_for: Requests unrelated to this template category or scenario.
Cases where the user explicitly asks for a different medium, layout, or visual style.
layout_rules: 【意图】干净通用的 horizontal-swipe deck (pitch / overview / study)。
style_rules: Cover + N 个 content 页 + 收尾 (N 由【用户内容】长度决定, 完整覆盖每个要点; 短内容 6-10 起步, 长内容应更多)
每页一个核心信息 + 1 张图 / 1 个图表
键盘 ← / → 切换 + hash 同步
content_rules: Cover + N 个 content 页 + 收尾 (N 由【用户内容】长度决定, 完整覆盖每个要点; 短内容 6-10 起步, 长内容应更多)
每页一个核心信息 + 1 张图 / 1 个图表
键盘 ← / → 切换 + hash 同步
quality_checks: Use the reference HTML as a style and structure guide, not as final placeholder content.
Preserve user-provided facts, numbers, dates, and claims.
Return one complete standalone HTML file with no markdown wrapper.
Keep visible text readable and avoid overlapping UI or content blocks.
